title: 皐月賞の後に・負けてもほのぼの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto gave it her honest all, not expecting
she would be a match for T.M. Opera O this early.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nonetheless, she's elated to have gained a
memorable experience. We enjoy a quiet picnic in
the center of the track.
